title: Level 316
wikitext:
{{VoidedTheme}} {{Background|file=Warped Beast.jpg}}
'''Logical Checkers'''
''Absolute, Immutable Stability''
{{Class Custom Image|class=Deadzone|hexagon=🕱|bg-image=Void.png|text-color=white|safety= Lethal Environment|security= Completely Stable|entity=Presence of One Powerful Entity}} ==Description== {{Blurimage|file=LogicalCheckers.jpg|caption=A photo of Level 316 in the radio wavelength.|width=300px|align=right}} '''Level 316''' is the 317th level of the Backrooms. At a glance, the level appears as a vast, dark void lacking any features aside from a glowing red square that one enters the level from. '''Level 316''''s atmosphere is a near vacuum, being mostly composed of helium. Due to the lack of any heat source, the level is cold, being only a few rontokelvins above absolute zero. The lack of a heat source also causes the level to have virtually no visible light; instead, the level is sparsely populated by highly redshifted radio waves. These radio waves originate from light that entered the level and traveled its vast distances. When imaged through radio, '''Level 316''' is revealed to have a checkered "floor" with tiles of astronomical size. Analysis of the checkered "floor" has confirmed that the white tiles are squares of solid hydrogen one atom thick and the black "tiles" are gaps in the "floor." Despite the immense size of these tiles, the distance from them causes the level to have virtually no gravity. The level is infinite in size perpendicular to the tiles, but finite parallel to the tiles. Every instant, new tiles are produced between existing tiles. These new tiles also produce more tiles, causing the level's size to increase exponentially. Energy that enters '''Level 316''' is subject to energy-based phenomena, causing all forms of energy aside from quantum energyOrdinary potential and kinetic energy, named as such due to being governed by the laws of quantum mechanics. to cease to exist. As higher thinking requires psychic energy, when sapient entities enter the level, they permanently lose the ability to think. While sapient entities are technically able to survive in this state, they become robotic and only act on instinct. While '''Level 316''' is completely uninhabitable, the level is of much scientific interest due to a unique phenomenon affected the level. '''Level 316''' has been used for distinguishing mundane objects and entities from anomalous ones. The level has also been used to sterilize objects of anomalobasidsThe taxonomic realm including all anomalous lifeforms in the Backrooms. and psychic radiation. While '''Level 316''' may have many useful properties, one should not attempt to utilize '''Level 316''' without proper equipment due to the risk of damage to extremities caused by the vacuum of the level. == Entities == While a vast number of entities likely exist in '''Level 316''', they are scattered across such large distances that the chance of encountering one is zero. However, one entity is likely to be encountered in '''Level 316'''. === The Warper ===
ENTITY NO. '''L-316''' {{Underline|FFFFFF}}

'''THREAT LEVEL:'''
'''5'''
'''Habitat:'''
'''Level 316'''
'''Aggression: 5/5'''
Targets all entities
'''Intellect: 6/5'''
Infinite computational power
'''Danger: 5/5'''
Actions are almost always effective
{{Blurimage|file=The Warper New.png|caption=Digitized cave art of The Warper|width=300px|align=right}} The Warper is an incredibly powerful entity located on '''Level 316'''. '''The Warper''' appears as a floating prolate spheroid with two red horns that curl up, protruding from its longest axis, and a red eye at its center; '''The Warper''' also has three arms in the opposite direction of the horns' curl, each with one elbow and three large, red claws, one claw being opposable. '''The Warper''' is capable of manipulating gravity, warping spacetime, and subjecting everything within its line of sight to the levels phenomenon. '''The Warper''' is able to induce an attractive gravitational effect by pulling its arms back and a repulsive gravitational effect by pushing its arms forward; the entity is also able to induce hyperbolic spatial geometry by unfurling its claws and spherical spatial geometry by curling its claws. '''The Warper''' is able to float by exerting force from its hands passively. '''The Warper''' has a strong dislike for the [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Phenomenon_9#cite_ref-5 Achospic Plane] and anything to do with it, including sapience. Despite despising sapience, '''The Warper''' is not hateful, but rather sympathetic, towards sapient entities and is even willing to communicate. When '''The Warper''' speaks, it does so choppily and with minimal vocabulary. Due to the entity's willingness to communicate, much of the information about '''Level 316''' and itself comes from '''The Warper'''. While '''Level 316''' acts as '''The Warper''''s home base, the entity has been known to enter other levels; however, for an unknown reason, '''The Warper''' is unable to enter any highly populated levels. Due to the often increased habitability of levels that are visited by '''The Warper''', various groups have popped up that venerate '''The Warper''' as a god. These groups often attempt rituals to bring '''The Warper''' to levels in order to make them habitable. Though these attempts have no effect the entity due to the entity being unaffected by the Achospic Plane, these groups still try as '''The Warper''' entering a level often guarantees its habitability. ==Colonies and Outposts== Due to the lethality of '''Level 316''''s environment, no settlements can be formed; however, various groups have set up bases outside entrances to '''Level 316'''. ===M.E.G. Base 539-316=== * Located on Level 539 * 15 researchers living here full time. * Willing to trade. * Doesn't allow outsiders inside. ===Backrooms Health Organization Sterilization Plant 316=== * Located on Level 347 * 10-35 workers working at a time. * Willing to trade. * Willing to treat wanderers' diseases. ===Kauer Research Base 316=== * Located on an unknown level. * Unknown number of residents. * Will direct wanderers away. ==Entrances and Exits == === Entrances=== * Noclipping into completely black area in levels visited by '''The Warper''' will lead here. * Having a karma below -150 in [[Level 995]] may lead one here. ===Exits === * Noclipping through the red square will lead back to the level '''Level 316''' was entered from. == Addenda ==
Interview with '''The Warper''' Interviewer: Agent ████████ ███████ Interviewee: '''Warper.''' Date: 12/07/2026 Background: After receiving reports of people acting robotically on Level 837, Agent ███████ was sent to the level with a drone mounted with a speakers in order to contact '''The Warper'''. ---- Agt. ███████: Sorry if I'm bothering you, but would it be a good time to ask you some questions right now? If it isn't, I will leave right away and never bother you again. '''The Warper''': I have a lot of time. I can answer. Agt. ███████: Alright, so, first of all, how do you feel about how some levels have [[Phenomenon 14|inconsistent geometries]]? '''The Warper''': I do not care. The geometry is perfectly rational. It is sad most can not see the beauty of the complexity. Agt. ███████: Could you elaborate on this "complexity"? '''The Warper''': The complexity is the increased amount of directions. I like [[:Category:Cluster I|this region]] of the [[Backrooms Wiki|world]]. It blends simplicity and complexity. Sadly, irrationality is not rare here. Agt. ███████: So you mean higher dimensions, right? Also, what is this irrationality you talk about? How much do you dislike it? '''The Warper''': First, I confirm. Second, the irrationalities are the Achospic and the nihilum. I dislike them both, but I dislike the Achospic as it is most common. Agt. ███████: Speaking of the Achospic, what are your opinions on sapience and [[Phenomenon 9|tuplas]]? '''The Warper''': I dislike both. Sapience is a stain on the beautiful. Sapience brings disorder to order. Tulpae are worse. Tulpae are crude fakes of rationality. Tulpae are irrationality trying to be rational. Tulpae fail at their one goal. Tuplae sicken me. Agt. ███████: So do you hate sapient beings? Also, what is the nihilum? '''The Warper''': First, I do not. They are ill. I cure them. They are victims of the Achospic. Second, the nihilum is the rot of this reality. The nihilum creates and destroys at will. The nihilum only has respect for the nihilum and nothing else. Agt. ███████: Thank you for all your answers, but I do have one last thing to ask. Why do you speak like that? If I'm being rude, I'm sorry. '''The Warper''': It is simple and easy. I like all questions too. I am fine with your question. Agt. ███████: Thank you for your time, and I wish you well. '''The Warper''': You too. <'''The Warper''' floats away from the drone while the drones flies away to Agent ███████.>
